title: MagicAbilities
description: A plugin that adds magical powers to minecraft!
body: # MagicAbilities - Minecraft Plugin This plugin adds a variety of amazing superpowers, through just the Spigot Api. ### Notes - Not all powers are equal, some are more op than the others. - Plugin was made and tested for 1.20.4+ versions of minecraft so if there is something wrong in the previous versions, **PLEASE DO NOT REPORT IT AS AN ISSUE**. ### Impact References - *Small Impact 💚* - *Medium Impact (Could be a bit annoying or Op) 💛* - *Large Impact (Will change the way you need to play) 💙* ### Current list of Powers and their impact on gameplay - 💛 - Ice ❄️ - 💛 - Fire 🔥 - 💛 - Warp (Teleportation) ⭐ - 💛 - Superior Warp (Like warp but with additional perks) ✨ - 💙 - Unstable Power (Switching dimensions, Glitching, Random effects) 🧭 - 💚 - Lightning Power ⚡ - 💛 - Shogun Power (Dashing, Sword blocking) ⚔️ - 💙 - Alchoholizm (Added for fun, you have to drink Awkward Potions) 🥃 - 💛 - Potato Power (Added for fun, Some new features to potatoes) 🥔 - 💛 - The Witcher 🐺 - 💛 - Nature 🌳 - 💙 - Twilight Mirage ☄️ - 💛 - Eternity ⚔️ - 💛 - Curseweaver ✨ ### To add powers to players do ```/setpower ``` ### Permissions - ```magic.admin``` ![Ice powers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cLFquxwt/images/522418213bea256b1fdbb04c93651eb2e0f869a8.png) ![Portals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cLFquxwt/images/4822b6f41b53a6088f4f8b7516071f53a1be4237.png) ### For more info Visit this [link](https://github.com/Pullolo/MagicAbilities/blob/master/README.md)
